name: UK GDPR + Data Protection Act 2018
website_obligation: Privacy notice (Art.13/14 disclosures), lawful basis per processing, data-subject-rights mechanism (access/erasure/portability/objection), security of processing, controller/DPO identity, ICO registration where required.
max_penalty: £17.5m or 4% global annual turnover

detection.logic: Parse policy for controller identity, lawful basis, retention, rights contact, intl transfer mechanism

name: Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations 2003
website_obligation: Prior informed active consent before non-essential cookies; soft opt-in for e-mail marketing to existing customers of similar products; granular reject-all as prominent as accept-all; no cookie wall.
max_penalty: Historically £500k; raised toward UK GDPR levels by Data (Use and Access) Act 2025

detection.logic: Playwright clean-load; intercept all Set-Cookie + JS cookie writes pre-interaction; classify marketing/analytics/essential
Check banner for pre-ticked boxes, reject-all parity, cookie-wall

name: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025
website_obligation: Raises PECR penalty caps to UK GDPR levels; adjusts cookie consent exemptions for low-risk analytics; recognised legitimate interests. Phased June 2025–June 2026.
max_penalty: Up to £17.5m or 4% global turnover (new PECR ceiling)

detection.logic: Re-baseline cookie consent against DUAA low-risk-analytics exemptions

name: Companies Act 2006 s.82 — Trading Disclosures
website_obligation: Display registered company name, registered number, registered office address, place of registration on the website. LLP = LLP number. Sole trader = name + principal place of business.
max_penalty: Fine up to £1,000 per officer; criminal offence

detection.logic: Regex footer for company number [0-9]{7,8}, 'Registered in', registered address
Verify number vs Companies House API matches trading name

name: Electronic Commerce (EC Directive) Regulations 2002
website_obligation: Provider must display name, geographic address, email for rapid contact, VAT number if registered, trade register number if applicable, supervisory authority if regulated; clear order-process steps.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; fine

detection.logic: Crawl contact/about for physical address, email, VAT number
Verify contact page 200 with full details

name: Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation & Additional Charges) Regulations 2013
website_obligation: Pre-contract information before online purchase; 14-day cancellation right for most distance contracts; model cancellation form; total price incl. taxes before payment; no pre-ticked add-ons.
max_penalty: Up to £5,000; contract may be unenforceable

detection.logic: On checkout verify total price incl VAT before payment; check withdrawal info
Verify cancellation/returns policy linked from product pages

name: Consumer Rights Act 2015
website_obligation: Terms must be fair and transparent; no unfair contract terms; goods/services/digital content as described and satisfactory quality. Unfair terms unenforceable.
max_penalty: Unenforceable terms; CMA action; consumer claims

detection.logic: Analyse T&Cs for unfair/disproportionate clauses, hidden liabilities

name: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008
section_ref: SI 2008/1277 (now read with DMCC Act 2024 for fake reviews/drip pricing)
website_obligation: No misleading actions/omissions; no false urgency; no omission of material information; no undisclosed paid endorsements.
max_penalty: Unlimited fine; up to 2 years imprisonment

detection.logic: Flag unsubstantiated superlatives, false urgency, hidden fees, fake/undisclosed endorsements

name: Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024
section_ref: DMCC Act 2024 Part 4; commenced SI 2025/272 (6 Apr 2025); subscription rules expected Spring 2026
website_obligation: Ban on fake/incentivised reviews; platforms must take reasonable steps to prevent fake reviews; total price (incl. mandatory fees) at invitation-to-purchase (anti-drip-pricing); subscription transparency + easy exit (Spring 2026, pending).
max_penalty: Up to 10% global turnover or £300,000 for individuals

detection.logic: Detect review widgets; check verification disclosure; check drip pricing at add-to-cart vs checkout

name: Equality Act 2010 — Website Accessibility
section_ref: Equality Act 2010 s.20,29 (reasonable adjustments); WCAG 2.1 AA accepted standard
website_obligation: Reasonable adjustments so disabled users are not at substantial disadvantage; WCAG 2.1 AA is the accepted benchmark.
max_penalty: Compensation claims; EHRC investigation

detection.logic: axe-core full WCAG 2.1 AA audit; report by impact + criterion
Check colour contrast, alt text, form labels, heading order

enforcement_feed: EHRC (no central feed); BAILII for case law

name: Public Sector Bodies (Websites and Mobile Applications) Accessibility Regulations 2018
website_obligation: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance + published accessibility statement in the required format.
max_penalty: Monitoring by GDS; publication of non-compliance

name: FTC Act Section 5 — Unfair or Deceptive Acts or Practices
website_obligation: No deceptive representations; clear and conspicuous disclosures; testimonials must disclose material connections; substantiation for all objective claims.
max_penalty: Up to $51,744 per violation per day

detection.logic: Flag undisclosed endorsements (#ad), superlatives without evidence, atypical-results before/after

name: Americans with Disabilities Act Title III — Website Accessibility
section_ref: 42 U.S.C. §12181 et seq.; 28 CFR Part 36; DOJ 2022 web guidance (WCAG 2.1 AA)
website_obligation: Websites of public accommodations must be accessible; DOJ references WCAG 2.1 AA.
max_penalty: $75k-$150k+ per lawsuit; DOJ civil penalties

detection.logic: axe-core; prioritise alt text, labels, captions, contrast, keyboard traps, 44x44 touch targets

enforcement_feed: DOJ ADA.gov; CourtListener for ADA web suits

name: CAN-SPAM Act 2003
website_obligation: Commercial email: accurate header/subject, physical postal address, working opt-out honoured within 10 business days. Opt-out (not opt-in) model.
max_penalty: Up to $53,088 per email (2025 adjustment)

detection.logic: Inspect signup flows; test that confirmation emails carry postal address + working unsubscribe

name: Telephone Consumer Protection Act
website_obligation: Prior express written consent for SMS/auto-dialed marketing; clear consent capture at web forms; honour STOP. Consent standards unsettled post-2025 court decisions.
max_penalty: $500-$1,500 per message/call

detection.logic: Check phone-capture forms for express-consent checkbox + disclosure proximate to submit

name: Children's Online Privacy Protection Act
website_obligation: Child-directed sites (under-13) must post COPPA policy, obtain verifiable parental consent before data collection, minimise collection.
max_penalty: Up to $51,744 per violation per child

detection.logic: If child-directed: check COPPA policy + parental-consent gate before collection
Flag behavioural ad cookies on child-directed pages

name: Restore Online Shoppers' Confidence Act (+ note: FTC Click-to-Cancel VACATED)
section_ref: 15 U.S.C. §8403; FTC Negative Option Rule (pre-2024 prenotification version restored Feb 2026)
website_obligation: Online negative-option/auto-renewal: clear disclosure of terms before billing, informed consent, simple cancellation mechanism. NOTE: the 2024 'Click-to-Cancel' four-step rule was VACATED by the 8th Circuit on 8 Jul 2025 — apply ROSCA + state ARLs, NOT click-to-cancel.
max_penalty: FTC Act §5 penalties; state ARL penalties

detection.logic: Check subscription checkout for pre-billing disclosure + consent; check cancellation path exists

name: California Consumer Privacy Act / CPRA
section_ref: Cal. Civ. Code §1798.100 et seq.; CPPA regs (cyber audit/risk/ADMT effective 1 Jan 2026); Delete Act DROP
website_obligation: Privacy policy (categories collected/purposes/sharing), 'Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information' link, 'Limit Use of Sensitive PI' link, honour Global Privacy Control signal, consumer rights.
max_penalty: $2,500 unintentional / $7,500 intentional per violation

detection.logic: Check footer for Do-Not-Sell + Limit-Sensitive-PI links; test GPC signal honoured

name: US State Privacy Patchwork (VA, CO, CT, TX, IN, KY, RI, MD, + others)
section_ref: VCDPA (VA); CPA (CO); CTDPA (CT); TDPSA (TX); IN/KY/RI live 1 Jan 2026; MODPA (MD) applies 1 Apr 2026; 20 enacted / 19 in effect 2026; OK SB546 effective 1 Jan 2027
website_obligation: State-specific privacy policy, universal opt-out (GPC) where required, sensitive-data consent (incl. neural/biometric/geolocation in CO/CT amendments), DPIAs, MD bans sensitive-data sale.
max_penalty: Typically up to $7,500 per violation

detection.logic: Check for universal opt-out link + GPC honouring; state-specific rights in policy

name: General Data Protection Regulation
regulator: National DPAs (CNIL, BfDI, AEPD, Garante, AP, DPC, etc.)
website_obligation: Privacy notice (Art.13/14), lawful basis per processing, data-subject rights, DPO contact where required, intl transfer safeguards, retention; active granular cookie consent for non-essential tracking.
max_penalty: €20m or 4% global annual turnover

detection.logic: Clean-load EU IP; classify cookies pre-consent

enforcement_feed: EDPB decisions; GDPR Enforcement Tracker (enforcementtracker.com); national DPAs via EUR-Lex

name: ePrivacy Directive 2002/58/EC (Cookie Law)
section_ref: Directive 2002/58/EC Art.5(3); national impl (DE TTDSG, FR Art.82 Loi I&L, etc.)
website_obligation: Prior consent before non-essential cookies; freely given/specific/informed/unambiguous; reject as easy as accept; no cookie wall (EDPB).
max_penalty: National: FR CNIL €150k+/case; DE €300k+/case; GDPR-linked max

detection.logic: Verify non-essential cookies blocked pre-consent; check reject parity + no cookie wall

name: European Accessibility Act (Directive (EU) 2019/882)
section_ref: Directive (EU) 2019/882; standard EN 301 549 (→WCAG 2.1 AA; v4.x →WCAG 2.2 AA expected 2026); enforcement from 28 Jun 2025
website_obligation: E-commerce, banking, transport ticketing, telecoms, AV media, e-books must meet EN 301 549; publish accessibility statement.
max_penalty: Varies: FR €75k-€300k/violation; NL up to €90k; DE €10k-€100k; IE up to €60k

detection.logic: axe-core EN 301 549/WCAG 2.1 AA; manual test required for full coverage

name: EU AI Act Article 50 — Transparency Obligations
section_ref: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 Art.50(1)-(5); applies 2 Aug 2026; Code of Practice expected Jun 2026
website_obligation: Chatbots/AI interaction must disclose AI; AI-generated content machine-readable marked; deepfakes labelled; emotion/biometric notice.
max_penalty: Up to €15m or 3% turnover (high-risk tier); €7.5m/1.5% for incorrect info

detection.logic: Detect chatbot; verify AI-disclosure at first interaction
Flag likely AI-generated media without label

name: Omnibus Directive (EU) 2019/2161
section_ref: Dir (EU) 2019/2161 amending UCPD 2005/29/EC Art.7, Price Indication 98/6/EC Art.6a, CRD 2011/83/EU; applied 28 May 2022
website_obligation: Disclose if/how reviews verified; ban fake reviews; show lowest prior 30-day price on reductions; disclose paid ranking + personalised pricing.
max_penalty: Up to 4% member-state turnover or €2m where turnover incalculable

detection.logic: Check review-verification disclosure; check 30-day prior-price on sale items; check paid-ranking labels

name: Consumer Rights Directive 2011/83/EU
section_ref: Dir 2011/83/EU; DE §312b BGB; FR L.221-1 Code conso
website_obligation: Pre-contract info before purchase (full price incl tax + charges, identity, address), 14-day withdrawal, model withdrawal form; total price before final step.
max_penalty: National: DE up to €50k/violation; FR up to €375k; cancellation rights

detection.logic: Verify total price incl VAT before payment; identity disclosure; withdrawal info

name: Unfair Commercial Practices Directive 2005/29/EC
website_obligation: No misleading/aggressive practices; no material omissions; banned practices blacklist (Annex I) incl. fake reviews post-Omnibus.
max_penalty: National (see Omnibus)

detection.logic: Flag misleading claims, false urgency, material omissions

name: Digital Services Act (Regulation (EU) 2022/2065)
section_ref: Reg (EU) 2022/2065 Arts. 14 (T&Cs), 26 (ad transparency), 30-31 (trader traceability), 25 (no dark patterns)
website_obligation: Clear T&Cs; ad transparency (who paid, why shown); no dark patterns; marketplaces must verify+display trader identity; illegal-content reporting.
max_penalty: Up to 6% global annual turnover

detection.logic: Check trader-identity disclosure on listings; dark-pattern detection in consent/cancel flows; ad-transparency labels

name: Germany Telemediengesetz / DDG + TTDSG — Impressum
website_obligation: Impressum within two clicks: full name + address, email + phone, VAT ID (DE+9 digits), commercial register (HRB/HRA), supervisory authority, professional title + applicable rules.
max_penalty: Competitor Abmahnung; injunction; fines up to €50,000

detection.logic: Parse for name, address, phone, email, VAT ID format DE\d{9}, HRB/HRA number

name: Germany Gesetz gegen den unlauteren Wettbewerb (UWG)
website_obligation: No misleading commercial communications; no unsolicited e-marketing without consent; comparative ads strictly limited.
max_penalty: Injunctions; Abmahnung costs; damages

detection.logic: Flag misleading claims + non-compliant comparative advertising for DE-facing copy

name: France LCEN — Mentions Légales
section_ref: Loi 2004-575 (LCEN) Art.6; Code de la consommation for e-commerce
website_obligation: Mentions Légales: publisher name + registered address, SIRET (14 digits), hosting provider details, publication director, VAT; professional services add body/title/PI insurance.
max_penalty: DGCCRF administrative fine; criminal sanctions for omissions

detection.logic: Parse for SIRET \d{14}, address, host, publication director

name: Spain LSSI + LOPDGDD
website_obligation: Legal notice: company name, NIF/CIF, registered address, commercial register, contact, professional college if applicable; IVA included in displayed prices.
max_penalty: CNMC fines up to €150,000; daily fines for persistence

detection.logic: Parse for NIF/CIF, address, register; verify IVA-inclusive prices

name: Italy Codice del Consumo + D.Lgs. 70/2003
website_obligation: Provider identification (Partita IVA IT+11 digits, REA number, address, email); consumer pre-contract info; price transparency.
max_penalty: AGCM fines; suspension of activity

detection.logic: Parse footer for Partita IVA IT\d{11}, REA, address, email

name: UAE Federal Personal Data Protection Law
section_ref: Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021; Data Office (Decree-Law 44/2021)
website_obligation: Privacy notice (controller identity, purposes, legal basis, data-subject rights, cross-border safeguards); consent as primary basis; Arabic notice advisable. Excludes DIFC + ADGM + health/credit data.

detection.logic: Parse policy for Art.9 disclosures; check Arabic availability

name: DIFC Data Protection Law 2020
website_obligation: GDPR-equivalent: privacy notice, lawful basis, data-subject rights, DPO where required, 72-hr breach notification, DPIA.
max_penalty: Up to USD 50,000 per violation (post-2025 amendment)

detection.logic: Policy references DIFC Law No.5/2020; DPO contact present

name: ADGM Data Protection Regulations 2021
regulator: ADGM Office of Data Protection / Registration Authority
website_obligation: GDPR-equivalent: privacy notice, lawful basis, data-subject rights, DPO, breach notification, adequacy for transfers.
max_penalty: Administrative fines (mirror GDPR proportionality)

detection.logic: Policy references ADGM DPR 2021; controller registration

name: Saudi Arabia Personal Data Protection Law
website_obligation: Privacy notice (controller, purposes, legal basis, rights), explicit consent for sensitive data, data-localisation for some categories, Arabic notice recommended.
max_penalty: Up to SAR 5,000,000 (~$1.3m); criminal penalties for sensitive-data breach

detection.logic: Arabic privacy notice; SDAIA disclosures; data rights

name: Qatar Personal Data Privacy Protection Law
website_obligation: Consent/lawful basis, privacy notice, data-subject rights (access/correction/erasure), security measures.

detection.logic: Policy for Law 13 compliance; data rights mechanism

name: Bahrain Personal Data Protection Law
website_obligation: Consent-based processing, privacy notice, controller registration, data-subject rights, transfers only to adequate countries.
max_penalty: Up to BHD 1,000,000 (~$2.7m); imprisonment possible

detection.logic: Policy for Bahrain PDPL; PDPA registration reference

name: Kuwait CITRA Data Privacy Protection Regulation
section_ref: CITRA Decision No. 42 of 2021 (SECTORAL; no omnibus national law)
website_obligation: Data security, consent for processing, privacy notice for telecom/IT sector services; cybercrime law imposes security duties.
max_penalty: CITRA enforcement; cybercrime-law penalties

detection.logic: HTTPS + security headers for KW-facing sites

name: Oman Personal Data Protection Law
section_ref: Royal Decree No. 6/2022; Exec Regs Ministerial Decision 34/2024; fully enforceable 5 Feb 2026
website_obligation: Consent, privacy notice, data-subject rights, controller obligations; permit for sensitive-data processing.
max_penalty: Fines per Exec Regs; OMR penalties

name: Egypt Personal Data Protection Law
section_ref: Law No. 151 of 2020; Exec Regs Decree 816/2025 (gazette 1 Nov 2025); full enforcement ~Nov 2026
website_obligation: Privacy notice, explicit consent for sensitive data, data-subject rights, controller registration, cross-border restrictions; Arabic notice.
max_penalty: Up to EGP 1,000,000; criminal penalties

name: Jordan Personal Data Protection Law
section_ref: Law No. 24 of 2023 (effective 17 Mar 2024; grace ended ~Mar 2025)
website_obligation: Privacy notice, consent, data-subject rights, cross-border restrictions, breach notification.
max_penalty: Council enforcement; fines

detection.logic: Policy for Jordan PDPL; data rights mechanism

name: Israel Protection of Privacy Law + Amendment 13
website_obligation: Privacy notice, database registration where required, data-subject access/correction, direct-marketing opt-out; expanded enforcement under Amendment 13.
max_penalty: PPA administrative fines (expanded under Amendment 13)

detection.logic: Israeli-law privacy notice; direct-marketing opt-out present

name: Schema.org / E-E-A-T Entity Signals (AI visibility)
section_ref: schema.org; Google Search Essentials; QRG E-E-A-T (NOT a law)
website_obligation: Organization schema (name,url,address,telephone,sameAs→Wikidata/LinkedIn), sector schema (MedicalOrganization/LegalService/LodgingBusiness), author schema w/ credentials.
max_penalty: No legal penalty — AI/search visibility loss only

detection.logic: Extract JSON-LD; validate Organization + sector schema required props + sameAs
Query 6 LLMs x 5 sector queries; measure citation rate vs competitors

name: robots.txt / llms.txt AI Crawler Access (AI visibility)
section_ref: robots.txt protocol; llms.txt (llmstxt.org); NOT a law
website_obligation: Do not accidentally block GPTBot/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot/Googlebot-Extended; consider llms.txt for structured LLM consumption.
max_penalty: No legal penalty — zero AI visibility for blocked crawlers

detection.logic: Fetch /robots.txt; check AI crawler Disallow rules; check /llms.txt presence

name: SRA Transparency Rules 2018
section_ref: SRA Transparency Rules 2018 r.1.3-1.6, r.2, r.4
website_obligation: Publish price + service info for named areas (conveyancing, probate uncontested, motoring summary, employment tribunal unfair dismissal, immigration excl. asylum; business: debt recovery ≤£10k, ET defence, licensing); complaints procedure; SRA digital badge + number (ALL firms).
max_penalty: SRA fines; 439 warnings + 31 fixed penalties issued since May 2023

detection.logic: Check named-area pages for pricing; SRA badge in footer
Verify SRA number vs SRA register

name: SRA Code of Conduct for Firms 2019 (marketing)
section_ref: SRA Code of Conduct for Firms 2019 paras 8.6-8.9
website_obligation: Accurate, not misleading marketing; no unsubstantiated outcome/success claims; no exploitation of vulnerability; disclose referral arrangements.
max_penalty: SRA enforcement; suspension/strike-off

detection.logic: Flag success-rate claims, guarantees, undisclosed referral fees

name: Legal Services Act 2007 — Reserved Activities Authorisation
website_obligation: Any reserved legal activity (rights of audience, litigation, conveyancing, probate, notarial, oaths) requires authorisation displayed on site.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; unlimited fine; up to 2 yrs imprisonment

detection.logic: Map each reserved activity to displayed authorisation

name: BSB Handbook — Barrister Marketing (rC20-rC21)
website_obligation: No misleading/inaccurate practice statements; no superiority claims without objective basis; BSB-regulated status displayed for chambers.
max_penalty: BSB disciplinary proceedings

name: ABA Model Rules 7.1-7.3 — Lawyer Advertising (state variations)
section_ref: ABA Model Rules 7.1-7.3; state bar variations (FL 4-7 file within 20 days; CA RPC 7.1; NY Part 1200)
website_obligation: No false/misleading communications; no guaranteed outcomes; past-results disclaimers; FL 'Advertising Material' label; specialisation only if certified.
max_penalty: State bar disciplinary; suspension/disbarment

detection.logic: Flag superlatives, outcome guarantees, past results without disclaimer

name: CCBE Code of Conduct Rule 2.6 — Lawyer Publicity (EU)
section_ref: CCBE Code of Conduct for European Lawyers; national bar rules (DE BRAO/BORA, FR RIN)
website_obligation: Publicity permitted subject to national bar rules; no misleading or superiority claims without basis; cross-border = comply with both bars.
max_penalty: National bar disciplinary; striking off

name: DIFC Legal Services Rules
section_ref: DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 (Courts Law); Legal Services Regulations
website_obligation: Firms practising before DIFC Courts display DIFC registration; non-misleading advertising; state DIFC/ADGM authorisation.
max_penalty: DIFC Courts disciplinary; licence revocation

name: MHRA Human Medicines Regulations 2012 — POM Advertising Prohibition
website_obligation: No advertising of prescription-only medicines to the public; OTC ads need name+indications+side effects+'ask pharmacist'; no off-licence therapeutic claims.
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; unlimited fine; product seizure

detection.logic: Flag POM names (Botox, Ozempic, Wegovy, Rx drugs) in consumer promo; flag off-licence efficacy claims

name: CQC Fundamental Standards — Provider Display
section_ref: SI 2014/2936; CQC reg.20 duty of candour
website_obligation: CQC-registered providers display registration status, provider ID, current rating, link to CQC profile; 'unrated' if applicable.
max_penalty: CQC enforcement; prosecution; fines up to £50k

detection.logic: Verify vs CQC API; rating displayed matches current

name: GMC Good Medical Practice 2024 — Advertising
website_obligation: Honest, not misleading; accurate qualifications/competence claims; no exploitative product endorsement; GMC number displayed.
max_penalty: GMC fitness to practise; suspension/erasure

detection.logic: Verify vs GMC register (web lookup; no public API)

name: ASA CAP Code Section 12 — Health, Beauty & Complementary
website_obligation: No misleading health claims; verifiable testimonials; weight-loss claims need substantiation; truthful before/after; accurate qualifications.
max_penalty: ASA upheld ruling (public); Trading Standards referral

name: HIPAA Marketing Rule + Tracking-Tech Guidance
section_ref: 45 CFR §164.508; HHS OCR guidance Dec 2022 on tracking tech
website_obligation: No PHI for marketing without authorisation; third-party trackers (Meta Pixel, GA4) on PHI-bearing pages (booking, conditions, portal) are impermissible disclosure; NPP link required.
max_penalty: Up to $1.9m per violation category per year

detection.logic: Flag ALL trackers on booking/condition/portal pages

name: FDA 21 CFR Part 202 — Rx Drug Advertising (DTC)
website_obligation: Rx ads: established name, fair balance of risks/benefits, approved claims only, brief summary / 'Full Prescribing Information' link; no off-label.
max_penalty: FDA warning letters; injunctions; criminal prosecution

detection.logic: Check fair balance; flag superiority without head-to-head; flag off-label

name: EU Directive 2001/83/EC — Medicinal Product Advertising
website_obligation: No public advertising of prescription medicines; OTC ads must be balanced and identifiable; no misleading therapeutic claims.
max_penalty: National enforcement; product withdrawal; fines

detection.logic: Flag Rx medicine promo to public; off-licence claims

name: UAE Health Advertising Rules (DHA/MOHAP/DOH)
section_ref: MOHAP Ministerial Resolution 430/2007; Cabinet Resolution 7/2007; DHA Standard DHA/HRS/HPSD/ST-21; Electronic Media Regulation 2018
website_obligation: Medical-advertisement licence number on health website/accounts; Medical Director approval; no before/after for cosmetic procedures; no result guarantees; no Rx promotion; no patient outcome testimonials.
max_penalty: Licence suspension; fines AED 100,000-200,000 (Electronic Media Reg)

detection.logic: Result guarantees; outcome testimonials; Rx promo

name: Saudi SFDA Medical/Health Product Advertising Approval
website_obligation: SFDA prior approval for medical/health product ads (incl. influencer ads), fee SAR 14,000/ad; no prescription-medicine advertising to public.
max_penalty: SFDA fines; ad withdrawal

detection.logic: Flag medical/health product ads without SFDA approval reference; Rx-to-public

name: CAP Code Rule 12.12 — Cosmetic Interventions
website_obligation: No trivialisation; before/after must not create unrealistic expectations; no implying normal appearance is inadequate; no under-18 targeting; no under-18-popular influencers.
max_penalty: ASA upheld ruling; Trading Standards referral; ad ban

detection.logic: Before/after pairs + cautionary language; age verification

name: Human Medicines Regs 2012 reg.286 — Botox/Injectable POM Advertising
section_ref: SI 2012/1916 reg.286 (Botox, Dysport, Bocouture, Azzalure, Xeomin = POM)
website_obligation: Illegal to advertise botulinum toxin / Rx injectables to public; may advertise consultation service only; cannot name the POM product.
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; unlimited fine

name: GDC Standards for the Dental Team — Advertising
website_obligation: Accurate, honest, not misleading; no unverifiable comparative claims; GDC registration number displayed; protected titles only by registrants.
max_penalty: GDC fitness to practise; erasure; criminal for protected-title misuse

name: GDC Specialist Title Restrictions
section_ref: Dentists Act 1984 s.38; GDC specialist lists
website_obligation: Protected specialist titles (orthodontist, oral surgeon, endodontist, etc.) only by dentists on the GDC specialist list.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; unlimited fine

detection.logic: Verify name on GDC specialist list

name: Package Travel & Linked Travel Arrangements Regulations 2018
website_obligation: Pre-contract info before booking: total price, itinerary, accommodation/transport, meals, visa/health, cancellation rights, insolvency protection (ATOL if flights).
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; unlimited fine

detection.logic: Pre-booking disclosures before checkout; ATOL logo+number if flights

name: Dubai DET/DTCM Tourism Licensing Display
section_ref: Law No. 6 of 1997 (Tourism Activities); DTCM Ordinance
website_obligation: Hotels/apartments/guesthouses display DTCM tourism licence number; star rating must match DTCM classification.
max_penalty: DTCM fines; licence revocation; closure

detection.logic: DTCM licence number; star rating vs classification

name: ADA Title III §36.302(e) — Hotel Reservation Accessibility
website_obligation: Hotel booking sites must describe accessible features in enough detail; accessible-room filter; hold accessible rooms for those needing them.
max_penalty: DOJ enforcement; settlements $25k-$100k+

name: CPRs 2008 — Property Material Information (NTSELAT)
section_ref: SI 2008/1277; NTSELAT Material Information Guidance 2022 (Phase A/B/C)
website_obligation: Material info before transactional decision: Phase A (always) price, tenure, council tax band; no misleading descriptions; accurate/disclosed-staged photos.
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; unlimited fine

detection.logic: Each listing has Phase A info

name: Estate Agents Act 1979 — CMP + Redress + Fees
section_ref: Estate Agents Act 1979; Provision of Information Regs 1991; CMP mandatory since 1 Apr 2019
website_obligation: Display Client Money Protection scheme membership, approved redress scheme (TPO/PRS) + number, fees transparency.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; unlimited fine; prohibition order

detection.logic: CMP badge + redress scheme + number + fees page

name: Dubai RERA/DLD Real Estate Marketing Rules
section_ref: Law No. 7 of 2007; Trakheesi permit system
website_obligation: Display RERA broker ORN + DLD licence; off-plan = Oqood + escrow details; properties registered before marketing.
max_penalty: RERA fines; licence revocation; criminal

detection.logic: ORN + DLD licence; Oqood/escrow for off-plan

name: Fair Housing Act §804(c) — Online Property Advertising
website_obligation: No discriminatory advertising (race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, disability); algorithmic targeting excluding protected classes also violates.
max_penalty: Civil penalties up to $107,050 (subsequent); DOJ prosecution

detection.logic: Flag discriminatory preference language ('adults only','perfect for families')

name: FSMA 2000 s.21 — Financial Promotion Restriction
website_obligation: No financial promotion unless FCA-authorised or approved; FCA FRN + 'Authorised and regulated by the FCA' statement.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; up to 2 yrs; unlimited fine

detection.logic: Verify FRN vs FCA Register; firm in good standing

enforcement_feed: FCA Final Notices; FCA warnings list

name: FCA COBS 4 — Financial Promotions Content
section_ref: FCA Handbook COBS 4.2.1R; COBS 4.12A (RMMI risk warnings)
website_obligation: Fair, clear, not misleading; past-performance disclaimers; mandatory risk warnings; no guaranteed returns; representative APR for credit.
max_penalty: FCA enforcement; up to £1m+ fine; criminal

detection.logic: Performance without disclaimer; guaranteed returns; missing risk warnings

name: FCA Consumer Duty (PRIN 2A / Principle 12)
website_obligation: Good outcomes for retail customers; consumer-understanding (plain language); no exploitation of biases; no unreasonable access barriers.
max_penalty: FCA supervisory action; financial penalties; censure

detection.logic: Plain language; jargon; complex fees in small print

name: FCA CONC 3 — Consumer Credit Advertising
website_obligation: Representative APR if any rate/charge shown; credit provider name; repayment details; total charge for credit; total amount payable.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; unlimited fine; FCA enforcement

detection.logic: Representative APR prominence where any rate/term shown

name: FCA MCOB 3A — Mortgage Financial Promotions
website_obligation: Mortgage promotions fair/clear/not misleading; APRC and representative example; risk statements ('your home may be repossessed').
max_penalty: FCA enforcement; fines

name: FCA ICOBS 2.2 — Insurance Financial Promotions
website_obligation: Fair/clear/not misleading; no false impression of cover/exclusions/cost; renewal-price disclosure; IPID for relevant products.
max_penalty: FCA enforcement; £1m+ fine; redress

detection.logic: Excess/exclusions upfront; renewal price; IPID linked

name: SEC Marketing Rule — Investment Adviser Advertising
website_obligation: No untrue statements; testimonials need disclosures (paid/unpaid, conflicts, not representative); net+gross performance equal prominence; ratings disclosures.
max_penalty: SEC enforcement; up to $1m per violation; disgorgement; bar

detection.logic: Testimonial disclosures; net+gross parity; past-performance disclaimer

name: FINRA Rule 2210 — Communications with the Public
section_ref: FINRA Rule 2210; Reg Notice 22-25 (projections re-proposed Feb 2026, not yet effective)
website_obligation: Fair/balanced/not misleading; principal approval for most retail comms; performance projections generally prohibited; past-performance disclosures; FINRA + SIPC member display.
max_penalty: FINRA fines up to $73k per violation; suspension; expulsion

name: SEC Regulation FD — Fair Disclosure
website_obligation: No selective disclosure of material non-public info; IR pages consistent; IPO quiet-period restrictions on promotional content (gun-jumping).
max_penalty: SEC enforcement; up to $200k entity per violation; disgorgement

detection.logic: Flag material non-public info in marketing; gun-jumping in IPO window
IR section consistency; SEC filing links current

name: MiFID II — Information to Clients
section_ref: Commission Delegated Reg 2017/565 Art.44; MiFID II Dir 2014/65/EU
website_obligation: Regulatory status, disputes body, investor compensation scheme membership; marketing identifiable as such; balanced risk/reward.
max_penalty: National enforcement; authorisation revocation; fines

detection.logic: Benefits without risk on product pages

name: DFSA Conduct of Business — Financial Promotions (DIFC)
website_obligation: Fair/clear/not misleading; identify firm + 'Regulated by DFSA'; past-performance disclaimers; restricted unsolicited promotions.
max_penalty: DFSA enforcement; fines; licence revocation; criminal

name: FCA PS23/6 — Cryptoasset Financial Promotions
section_ref: FSMA 2000 s.21; FCA PS23/6; COBS 4.12A (in force 8 Oct 2023)
website_obligation: Verbatim risk warning; ban on incentives; 24-hr cooling-off + personalised risk warning + appropriateness + categorisation for first-timers; FSCS non-protection statement.
max_penalty: Criminal offence (FSMA s.25); unlimited fine; up to 2 yrs

detection.logic: Verbatim FCA risk warning; cooling-off; no incentives

name: MiCA — Crypto-Asset Marketing Communications
website_obligation: Marketing identified as such; fair/clear/not misleading; whitepaper reference; no contradiction of whitepaper; risk statement; no undisclosed public-figure endorsement; no value projections.
max_penalty: National enforcement; licence revocation; publication of breach

name: VARA Marketing Regulations 2024 (Dubai)
website_obligation: Display VARA licence; fair/clear/not misleading; no guaranteed returns; risk warnings; retail-directed additional disclosures.
max_penalty: VARA fines; licence suspension/revocation

name: EU Insurance Distribution Directive 2016/97
website_obligation: IPID for non-life products before contract; key product info accessible; remuneration nature disclosed; no misleading cover claims.
max_penalty: National enforcement; authorisation revocation

detection.logic: IPID linked; distributor registration + authority disclosed

name: Food Information Regulations 2014 — Allergen Disclosure
website_obligation: Online food sellers display all 14 allergens in writing before order, at menu display AND before checkout.
max_penalty: Unlimited fine; prosecution (Natasha's Law)

detection.logic: Allergen info per dish before checkout

name: Calorie Labelling (Out of Home Sector) Regulations 2021
website_obligation: Businesses with 250+ employees display calories per item on online menus + 'Adults need around 2000 kcal a day' statement.
max_penalty: Fine; FSA/local authority notice

detection.logic: Calorie counts per dish + reference-intake statement (if 250+ emp)

name: HFSS Promotion, Placement & Advertising Restrictions
section_ref: Food (Promotion and Placement) (England) Regs 2021 (50+ emp, placement Oct 2022, volume promo Oct 2025); Health & Care Act 2022 Sch.18 ad restrictions (9pm watershed + online paid ban) enforceable 5 Jan 2026
website_obligation: Businesses with 250+ employees: no HFSS product in paid online ads / brand-site promotional content. Retailers 50+ employees + >2,000 sq ft: volume-promotion + placement limits.
max_penalty: ASA/Trading Standards; unlimited fines

detection.logic: HFSS products in promo context (if 250+ emp); volume deals on HFSS

name: Portman Group Code — Alcohol Promotion
section_ref: Portman Group Code of Practice 6th Edition (2022)
website_obligation: No appeal to under-18s; no social/sexual success claims; no therapeutic claims; unit count + responsibility messaging; age verification.
max_penalty: Portman ruling; product withdrawal; Trading Standards referral

detection.logic: Unit count, ABV, Drinkaware link, age gate

name: EU Food Information Regulation 1169/2011 — Online Food Sales
website_obligation: Mandatory food info before online purchase: 14 allergens, nutrition declaration, ingredients, net quantity, durability date, manufacturer, country of origin (certain foods).
max_penalty: National enforcement; product withdrawal

detection.logic: All mandatory labelling elements per product before purchase

name: UKVI Student Sponsor Website Obligations
section_ref: UKVI Sponsor Guidance; Immigration Rules Part 6A; BCA metrics
website_obligation: Accurate course info (fees, duration, entry requirements); no misleading visa-eligibility claims; sponsor status displayed where international students recruited.
max_penalty: Licence revocation; visa refusals; sponsor bar

name: CMA Higher Education Consumer Law Guidance
section_ref: CMA HE guidance (2015/2023); Consumer Rights Act 2015
website_obligation: Accurate course info before enrolment; clear info on changes; fair complaints procedure; no unfair student-contract terms.
max_penalty: CMA enforcement; fee refunds; adverse publicity

detection.logic: Course info accuracy; generic 'subject to change' without disclosure

name: Dubai KHDA School Licensing Display
website_obligation: Dubai schools display KHDA licence + current inspection rating; no unapproved curriculum claims; accurate ratings.
max_penalty: KHDA licence suspension; fines; closure

detection.logic: Unapproved curriculum; outdated rating as current

name: CMA Green Claims Code
section_ref: CMA Green Claims Code 2021; Competition Act 1998; CPRs 2008
website_obligation: Green claims truthful, clear, substantiated, full-lifecycle, fair comparisons; 'eco/sustainable/carbon neutral/net zero' need evidence near claim.
max_penalty: CMA order; up to 10% global turnover; corrective ads

detection.logic: Flag green claims; check substantiation proximity
Certification badges link to valid cert

name: EU Empowering Consumers for Green Transition Directive
website_obligation: Ban generic green claims without proof; ban offset-based 'carbon neutral'; only approved-scheme sustainability labels; substantiate specific claims.
max_penalty: National enforcement; fines; product withdrawal

name: UAE E-Commerce Law (Federal Decree-Law 14/2023)
website_obligation: Display commercial registration; Arabic product info; AED pricing; T&Cs; returns policy; secure payment; data protection notice.
max_penalty: MoE fines; trade licence suspension

detection.logic: Commercial licence; Arabic info; AED pricing

name: Saudi E-Commerce Law (Royal Decree M/126)
section_ref: Royal Decree M/126 of 2019; Implementing Regs 2020
website_obligation: Display commercial registration; complete product info; total price before order; Arabic T&Cs + returns; order confirmation within 24h; no false info.
max_penalty: MCI fines up to SAR 1m; criminal for repeat

detection.logic: Commercial registration; Arabic T&Cs + returns; total price before order

name: FCA CONC 3 — Automotive Finance Advertising
section_ref: FCA CONC 3; Consumer Credit Act 1974; FCA PS26/3 (motor-finance commission redress)
website_obligation: Representative APR if any rate/charge shown; credit provider; repayment details; total charge; commission-arrangement transparency.
max_penalty: Criminal offence; unlimited fine; FCA enforcement

detection.logic: Representative APR prominence; FRN near offers

name: FTC Used Car Rule — Buyers Guide
website_obligation: Display Buyers Guide info on used-vehicle listings (warranty/as-is); no misleading history claims; mileage + VIN displayed.
max_penalty: FTC up to $51,744 per violation per vehicle

name: CMA/ASA EV & Emissions Environmental Claims
section_ref: CMA Green Claims Code; ASA CAP 11; Road Vehicles (Construction & Use) Regs 1986
website_obligation: EV range claims based on WLTP; no unqualified '0 emissions'; no overstated fuel economy.
max_penalty: CMA order; ASA ruling; up to 10% turnover

detection.logic: Range claims without WLTP; unqualified '0 emissions'

name: EU Health Claims Regulation 1924/2006
website_obligation: Only EFSA-authorised health/nutrition claims; no 'boosts immunity/anti-ageing' unless authorised; 'probiotic' not approved as a claim in EU.
max_penalty: National enforcement; product withdrawal

detection.logic: Cross-ref claims vs EFSA register; flag 'probiotic/boosts immunity' unauthorised

name: FTC Substantiation Doctrine — Health/Fitness Claims
section_ref: FTC Policy Statement on Advertising Substantiation 1984; 15 U.S.C. §45; Health Products Compliance Guidance 2022
website_obligation: Reasonable basis (competent reliable scientific evidence) for all objective health/fitness claims; atypical-results disclosure on testimonials.
max_penalty: FTC up to $51,744 per violation; corrective ads; disgorgement

detection.logic: Flag 'clinically proven' without citation; comparative without head-to-head

name: ASA CAP Code Section 15 — Food, Food Supplements & Health Claims
section_ref: CAP Code Section 15; Nutrition and Health Claims (England) Regs 2007 (GB-retained register)
website_obligation: Only GB-register-authorised claims; no disease prevention/treatment/cure claims on food/supplements; exact register wording required.
max_penalty: ASA upheld ruling; Trading Standards referral; product withdrawal

detection.logic: Cross-ref vs GB-retained register; flag disease claims; approximate wording

name: FSA Novel Foods Regulations — CBD
section_ref: EU Novel Foods Reg 2015/2283 (retained UK); FSA Novel Foods authorisation list
website_obligation: CBD food products need FSA Novel Foods authorisation or validated waiting-list status; no medicinal claims; accurate CBD content per dose.
max_penalty: MHRA/FSA enforcement; product withdrawal; prosecution

detection.logic: Medicinal claims ('treats anxiety') making it a medicine

name: FDA DSHEA — Dietary Supplement Website Requirements
website_obligation: Mandatory disclaimer near structure/function claims ('This statement has not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.'); no disease claims; FDA facility registration.
max_penalty: FDA warning letter; injunction; criminal; recall

detection.logic: Verbatim FDA disclaimer near claims; Supplement Facts panel

name: MHRA Borderline Medicinal Claims — CBD
section_ref: Human Medicines Regs 2012; MHRA borderline products guidance; Medicines Act 1968
website_obligation: CBD with medicinal claims = medicine requiring MHRA authorisation; no claims it treats anxiety/depression/pain/epilepsy/any condition.
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; enforcement notice; seizure; unlimited fine

detection.logic: Product names implying medicinal use ('CBD Pain Cream')

name: RCVS Code of Professional Conduct — Veterinary Advertising
section_ref: RCVS Code of Professional Conduct; advertising guidance
website_obligation: No misleading/inaccurate statements; no unsubstantiated superiority; RCVS registration displayed; protected titles only by registrants.
max_penalty: RCVS disciplinary; suspension/removal

detection.logic: Verify named vets vs RCVS register

name: VMD — Veterinary Medicines POM-V Advertising
website_obligation: POM-V cannot be advertised to public; only to vets/pharmacists; OTC vet products must follow authorised info.
max_penalty: VMD enforcement; criminal; unlimited fine

detection.logic: POM-V product names in consumer promo
OTC vet products include authorisation info

name: ICAEW Code of Ethics — Advertising
website_obligation: No misleading qualification/service claims; 'ICAEW Chartered Accountants' only if qualified; audit firms display Companies House audit registration.
max_penalty: ICAEW disciplinary; loss of membership

name: RICS Rules of Conduct — Advertising
website_obligation: Display RICS firm registration; no misleading claims; CMP scheme for property-holding firms.
max_penalty: RICS disciplinary; expulsion; Trading Standards referral

detection.logic: RICS firm registration logo + ID; CMP badge

name: ARB Architects Code — Protected Title
section_ref: Architects Act 1997; ARB Code of Conduct 2017
website_obligation: 'Architect' title only by ARB-registered persons; ARB registration accessible; no misleading qualification claims.
max_penalty: Criminal offence (Architects Act 1997); unlimited fine

name: EU Services Directive 2006/123/EC — Professional Transparency
website_obligation: Service providers display: name, legal status, address, contact, VAT, professional body + rules, PI insurance where required.
max_penalty: National enforcement; fines

detection.logic: Name, address, VAT, professional body, rules reference

name: CAA ATOL Regulations 2012
website_obligation: Selling packages with flights requires ATOL licence; display ATOL logo + number; ATOL certificate at booking; no implied protection without licence.
max_penalty: Criminal prosecution; unlimited fine; consumer claims

detection.logic: ATOL logo + number on package + booking pages

name: EU Package Travel Directive 2015/2302
website_obligation: Pre-contract info before booking: total price, organiser identity, accommodation/transport, meals, visa/health, cancellation penalties, insolvency protection, traveller-rights summary; durable medium.
max_penalty: National enforcement; contract cancellable

detection.logic: Insolvency protection certificate; Standard Information Form

name: US DOT Full Fare Advertising Rule
website_obligation: Total price incl. taxes/fees must be most prominent; no base-fare-only advertising; all mandatory fees in advertised price.
max_penalty: DOT civil penalties up to $37,377 per violation

detection.logic: Total price most prominent before checkout

name: FTC Green Guides (16 CFR Part 260)
website_obligation: Environmental claims truthful, substantiated, specific, qualified; 'recyclable' needs substantial-majority access; 'carbon offset' transparent on project/standards/timing.
max_penalty: FTC up to $51,744 per violation per day; corrective ads

detection.logic: Certification logos link to valid cert

name: Ofgem Standards of Conduct — Energy Supplier
section_ref: Ofgem Standards of Conduct; Supply Licence Conditions
website_obligation: Transparent tariff terms (standing charge, unit rates, exit fees); no misleading green-tariff claims (REGO-backed); key info accessible.
max_penalty: Ofgem enforcement; licence breach; fines; compensatory payments

name: EU Taxonomy + SFDR — Sustainable Finance Disclosure
website_obligation: 'Green/sustainable/ESG' financial products disclose Taxonomy alignment; SFDR pre-contractual sustainability disclosures; no greenwashing.
max_penalty: National CA enforcement; fines

name: FTC Endorsement Guides 2023 — Influencer Disclosure
website_obligation: Clear/conspicuous disclosure of material connections (paid, gifted, equity); near the claim, not buried; applies to personal-brand sites + linked social.
max_penalty: FTC up to $51,744 per undisclosed endorsement

name: EU DSA Art.26 — Commercial Communication Disclosure
website_obligation: Commercial content clearly identified; no dark patterns; 'published by X on behalf of Y' for commercial content.
max_penalty: DSC enforcement; platform removal; up to 6% turnover (platforms)

name: UAE Cybercrime Law — Online Content & Reputation
website_obligation: No content harming others' reputation/honour; no false news; no publishing third-party financial/personal data without consent.
max_penalty: Imprisonment up to 2 yrs; fines up to AED 500k

detection.logic: Reputation-damaging content without factual basis; fake reviews; false commercial info on competitors
